mapper.insert: INSERT INTO defect (inspect_id, category_id, confidence, x1, y1, x2, y2, x_cord, y_cord) VALUES (#{inspectId}, #{categoryId}, #{confidence}, #{x1}, #{y1}, #{x2}, #{y2}, #{xCord}, #{yCord})
mapper.select: SELECT d.defect_id, d.inspect_id, d.category_id, c.name AS category_name, c.name_kr AS category_name_kr, d.confidence, d.x1, d.y1, d.x2, d.y2, d.x_cord, d.y_cord, (SELECT f.path FROM file f WHERE f.table_name = 'defect' AND f.table_id = d.defect_id ORDER BY f.file_id DESC LIMIT 1) AS cropped_image_url, d.create_date FROM defect d LEFT JOIN category c ON d.category_id = c.category_id WHERE d.inspect_id = #{inspectId} ORDER BY d.create_date DESC

SELECT d.defect_id, d.inspect_id, d.category_id, c.name AS category_name, c.name_kr AS category_name_kr, d.confidence, d.x1, d.y1, d.x2, d.y2, d.x_cord, d.y_cord, (SELECT f.path FROM file f WHERE f.table_name = 'defect' AND f.table_id = d.defect_id ORDER BY f.file_id DESC LIMIT 1) AS cropped_image_url, d.create_date FROM defect d LEFT JOIN category c ON d.category_id = c.category_id WHERE d.defect_id = #{defectId}
